2320320.name: Re-Activated Demo
2320320.description:
Re-Activated is a 2D puzzle platformer game where you need to manipulate the movement system of a robot to pass the levels. You control the little flying robot named “Minic” to help the robot. Explore the world and solve the puzzles in a relaxing 1-bit style atmosphere.

You play as a little robot called "Minic" and to pass the levels, there are bigger robots to help. The big robot's only function is to walk and stop but Minic can manipulate the big robot's movement system to create different actions. As a Minic, your purpose is to combine these functions cleverly to solve puzzles.

To use these functions, use the plugboard of the big robot's brain and define different actions. Plugboard's Input & Output sections are there to help you. Create multiple combinations of movement systems and solve Engaging Puzzles.

Explore the first world of the game in a facility of robots in a relaxing 1-bit pixel-perfect setting!

This demo will provide you with 15-20 minutes of gameplay to experience our core mechanics."
2320320.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 俄语, 土耳其语
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
